calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
No appearance by Plaintiff.
Ryan Marie Baker 415-632-9922 Defendant in Pro Per.

Hearing is held. Ms. Baker argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CONSUMER PORTFOLIO SERVICES, INC. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Defendant Ryan Baker's claim of exemption is denied. The levying officer is directed to withhold $50 per pay period (every week) from defendant's earnings.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
